Hero.description: Restore the health and aesthetics of your smile with certified specialists, 3D technology, and pain-free protocols in an environment designed for your relaxation.

form.title: Schedule Your Evaluation
form.subtitle: Leave your details and we will contact you in less than 15 minutes.
form.name: Full Name
form.security: Your data is protected and encrypted.

Services.title: Everything your smile needs
Services.subtitle: We offer comprehensive treatments in one place, supported by state-of-the-art technology for precise and fast results.
Services.desc: Personalized treatments using the highest quality biocompatible materials to ensure durability and natural aesthetics.

WhyUs.title: We change the way you go to the dentist.
WhyUs.b1_desc: Our sterilization protocols exceed international standards, guaranteeing a 100% safe environment.
WhyUs.b2_desc: Your time is valuable. We schedule with wide margins to ensure you enter the office exactly at your appointment time.
WhyUs.b3_desc: We only work with certified laboratories and globally recognized brands for implants and crowns.

Testimonials.title: Real Stories, Real Smiles
Testimonials.subtitle: Don't take our word for it, listen to those who have already transformed their smile.
Testimonials.r1_text: "All my life I was terrified of the dentist. Here they explained everything patiently, played music to relax me, and I felt absolutely no pain. Incredible."
Testimonials.r2_text: "I went for a smile design and the result exceeded my expectations. The 3D scanner lets you see how you will look before starting. A team of true professionals."
Testimonials.r3_text: "I had an emergency on a Sunday morning. They saw me quickly, saved my tooth, and the treatment was exceptional. They have gained a patient for life."

CTA.title: Smile with confidence again
CTA.subtitle: We are located in the heart of Bavaro, Punta Cana. Modern facilities, safe parking, and easy access.

Footer.brand_desc: Specialists in transforming lives through oral health and advanced dental aesthetics.

Alerts.success: Appointment requested successfully! Our team will call you shortly to confirm the time.
